title: Nevanlinna Theory on Geodesic Balls of Complete K√§hler Manifolds

errors.description: The error is that the Green function $G_R(o,x)$ for the geodesic ball $B(R)$ was incorrectly stated to satisfy the Dirichlet boundary condition on the geodesic sphere $\partial B(R)$, when in fact it does not necessarily vanish on the boundary as required by the Dirichlet condition.
